title: Brazilian-Style Tofu Pão
description: A vegan twist on traditional Brazilian pão, featuring crispy bread and marinated tofu.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Slice the bread into 1-inch thick rounds.
3. Cook the bread rounds in the skillet for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy and golden.
4. Meanwhile, marinate the tofu by mixing together lime juice, garlic powder, and a pinch of salt in a shallow dish.
5. Add the tofu to the marinade and let it sit for at least 10 minutes.
6. Grill or pan-fry the marinated tofu until crispy on the outside and tender on the inside.
7. Assemble the pão by spreading a layer of vegan mayonnaise on each bread round, followed by a slice of marinated tofu, some diced avocado, and a sprinkle of parsley.
